name: find-skills
description: Discover and install agent skills from the open skills ecosystem via skills.sh.

prerequisites.name: npx
prerequisites.install_hint: Install Node.js from https://nodejs.org/ (npx is bundled with npm)

methods.name: npx
methods.command: echo 'find-skills uses npx skills — no global install needed'

install.notes: Uses npx skills at runtime — no global installation required. Browse skills at https://skills.sh/
